title: polystichum caespitosum
intro: Polystichum caespitosum, also known as the creeping shield fern, is a type of perennial fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. Native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum caespitosum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Polystichum caespitosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
